name: Asus XG27ACMG (IPS Panel, Res: 2560X1440, 270Hz, 1ms GTG ) 2K
highlights: ROG Strix XG27ACMG is a high-performance 27-inch WQHD gaming monitor featuring a blistering 270Hz refresh rate, ultra-fast 1ms GTG response time, and vivid Fast IPS panel with 95% DCI-P3 and 125% sRGB color gamut
Equipped with DisplayHDR 400, ELMB Sync, Adaptive-Sync, and low blue light hardware, this monitor ensures stunning visuals and smooth gameplay
Its ergonomic design with full adjustability and USB-C support makes it perfect for both professional and competitive gamers
